head: 23a0840
current_skill: superpowers:writing-plans (mid-execution; orientation + advisor done; plan NOT yet written)

current_subproject.name: D2 (order-list SLA column + per-tier amber threshold)
current_subproject.plan_status: NOT WRITTEN — paused before writing due to context exhaustion at 96%

decisions_locked_for_d2.decision: New SLA column on OrderRow (table view) + replace OrderStatusPage card-view hardcoded 24/48h goalNote with same logic
decisions_locked_for_d2.rationale: user chose 'new column' over coloring existing Lab time

decisions_locked_for_d2.decision: Full tier fidelity: priority > group-tier > default; multi-group sample takes tightest group tier
Worst-active-sample drives the order verdict; published excluded; not-received => awaiting
decisions_locked_for_d2.rationale: matches existing worstState pattern; user-confirmed simultaneous check-ins make aggregation by tier-tightness the discriminator
user confirmed; matches D1 Lab line

decisions_locked_for_d2.decision: Amber threshold is per-tier (sla_tiers.amber_threshold_percent INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 20, 1-100)
Color: red if breached; amber if (remaining/target)*100 < tier.amber_threshold_percent; else green. Palette mirrors processing-time field
POST /sample-priorities/lookup with body {sample_uids:[...]}, cap 500, sparse response {items:[{sample_uid,priority}]}
decisions_locked_for_d2.rationale: advisor caught GET URL-length issue at 500 UIDs x 32 chars; switched to POST to match B's /sla/status pattern

decisions_locked_for_d2.decision: Bulk priority client query keyed by sorted-UID hash with staleTime 5min; scaling-out path (per-UID useQueries, localStorage hydration) documented but deferred
decisions_locked_for_d2.rationale: user wants performance; lean now with explicit scaling path

decisions_locked_for_d2.decision: No live ticking; refetch with orders query + 'Refresh all data' button only

advisor_sharpenings_to_bake_into_plan: Bulk priorities = POST /sample-priorities/lookup (DONE in spec; use POST in plan).
i18n keys co-commit with consuming task (NOT a consolidated late task): orderStatus.sla.* with OrderSlaCell task; preferences.sla.amberThreshold/percentRemaining with SlaPane task.
useOrderSlaStatuses queryKey MUST be stable hash: ['order-sla-status', sortedUidsHash, sortedReceivedAtHash, tierConfigHash] - else re-render thrash wastes the 5min stale.
Verdict aggregation is useMemo, not another useQuery (pure transform of cached inputs + the one snapshot query).
Two cell components: OrderSlaCell (order-aggregated, table view) + SampleSlaIndicator (per-sample, card-view goalNote replacement) sharing a color-classification primitive.

Task 12 (verification sweep) MUST note the 2 pre-existing dev-DB tier-drift failures (test_default_tier_encodes_old_24h_goal, test_list_returns_seeded_default) are KNOWN out-of-scope; do not bisect D2 looking for them.

proposed_plan_tasks.name: Backend: amber_threshold_percent on sla_tiers (model + migration + Pydantic + 1-100 validation + tests)
Backend: POST /sample-priorities/lookup (Pydantic + endpoint + tests with cap/empty/auth)
Frontend api.ts: extend SlaTier types with amber_threshold_percent; add getAnalysisServices(); add bulk samplePrioritiesLookup(uids)
Frontend services: useAnalysisServices + useSamplePriorities (5min stale, sorted-UID hash key)

Frontend lib: src/lib/sla-resolution.ts (buildServiceToGroupTierMap, resolveSampleTier with priority>group>default + multi-group tightest, classifySampleColor, aggregateOrderSlaVerdict) + unit tests INCLUDING test_unmapped_analysis_keyword_falls_through_to_default
Frontend hook: useOrderSlaStatuses (stable queryKey hash; useMemo aggregation NOT useQuery) + hook test
Frontend components: OrderSlaCell + SampleSlaIndicator (share color primitive) + orderStatus.sla.* i18n keys (en/fr/ar) + render tests for all 7 states
Frontend integration: OrderRow.tsx gains SLA <td> + slaVerdict? prop + order-row.test.tsx update
Frontend integration: OrderStatusPage.tsx wires useOrderSlaStatuses + table header + REPLACES card-view goalNote block (lines 277-292) with SampleSlaIndicator
Frontend integration: CustomerStatusPage.tsx wires hook + adds SLA column header
SlaPane TierCard: amber-threshold input + preferences.sla.amberThreshold/percentRemaining i18n keys (en/fr/ar)
Full verification sweep (backend SLA suite + frontend typecheck/vitest/lint changed files + live smoke; NOTE the 2 pre-existing tier-drift failures are KNOWN out-of-scope)

key_orientation_facts_for_planner: Docker containers: accu-mk1-backend, accu-mk1-frontend. Tests at /app/tests in container.

Backend SamplePriority model: sample_priorities(sample_uid PK String(50), priority String(20) default 'normal', updated_at). Existing endpoint /worksheets/inbox/{sample_uid}/priority (singleton PUT). No bulk read endpoint yet.
Existing bulk IN(...) SQL pattern at backend/main.py:12510 - mirror for new endpoint.

Local /analysis-services endpoint at backend/main.py:2401 returns AnalysisServiceResponse list (has id + keyword - what we need for keyword->id mapping). NO TS GET client yet (only PUT for peptide and POST for sync). Add one.
DO NOT confuse with /explorer/analysis-services (line 7605) which PROXIES to Integration Service for SENAITE data - wrong endpoint for our needs.
ServiceGroup TS interface (src/lib/api.ts:3805) already has sla_tier_id + member_ids: number[]. getServiceGroups() exists.
OrderRow rendered by OrderStatusPage.tsx AND CustomerStatusPage.tsx - SLA column goes in both. Header updates in both parents.
Card-view goalNote to replace: src/components/OrderStatusPage.tsx lines 277-292. Uses item.lookup.date_received per item; sample-level not order-level.
sampleLookupMap construction in OrderStatusPage at line 648 (useMemo over useQueries result) - hook input source.

Backend main.py imports (already from B) at top: 'from datetime import datetime, date, time, timezone'; 'from sqlalchemy import select, desc, delete, update, func, extract'; 'from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo'; models import includes BusinessHoursConfig, LabHoliday, SlaTier, SlaPriorityTier, SamplePriority.
i18n convention: flat dotted keys in locales/{en,fr,ar}.json - ALL THREE get identical English (translation deferred, matches existing SLA convention).
ESLint: Array<T> forbidden (use T[]); Zustand selectors only (no destructuring). 3 pre-existing baseline errors in api.ts (~1730/3224/3757) - ignore.
B's POST /sla/status batch endpoint already shipped (commit 7f4c365 + 7aa20ec) - D2 just calls fetchSlaStatuses(items) from api.ts.
Color palette to mirror: text-green-600, text-amber-500 (from-D1: text-amber-400/text-yellow-600), text-red-500/text-red-400, text-muted-foreground.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to reset pre-existing dev-DB SLA tier drift (default=2880 + Microbiology id=21 tier) before/after D2 ships
human_actions_pending.context: 2 A/C tests (test_default_tier_encodes_old_24h_goal, test_list_returns_seeded_default) fail in isolation because the DB default is 2880 not the seeded 1440. NOT a B regression. May be real lab config OR leftover from a crashed A/C test run.

next_action: Run /gsd-resume-work or open a fresh session. Resuming agent reads spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-27-d2-sla-column-design.md + this handoff, then invokes superpowers:writing-plans skill to write the D2 plan to docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-27-d2-sla-column.md (~12 tasks per proposed_plan_tasks). After plan written + committed, ask user to choose execution mode (subagent-driven recommended, matching B's flow).
context_notes: Mid-writing-plans for D2. Spec is finalized and pushed (23a0840 - the POST switch was advisor-driven). Orientation + advisor done; plan-writing itself paused before any plan content was written. The 7 advisor sharpenings list is the most important reference - those caught real issues (POST not GET, stable queryKey, useMemo aggregation, two components). The proposed_plan_tasks list is the executor's task scaffold; flesh out each with TDD bite-sized steps + complete code blocks like B's plan did. B's plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-27-sla-business-hours.md is the structural template.
